criteria.name: feature_shortlist_pin_and_count

criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Voice Payments and Quick Buy 2.0 were pinned successfully, but unpinning Voice Payments and verifying the final state was not completed. Evidence: brief-shared.png

criteria.name: compare_tray_max_three
criteria.description: Add to compare accepts up to three feature names in the Compare tray; attempting a fourth shows Compare is full (3/3) and leaves the tray at exactly three names.
criteria.reasoning: Three compare items were present; a fourth attempt produced “Compare is full, 3 of 3” and left the tray at 3/3. Evidence: deep-link-shared.png

criteria.name: theme_filter_and_launch_search
criteria.description: Choosing Theme filter Payment Gateway hides non-Payment-Gateway feature cards while section chrome stays; typing Card into Launch search further narrows to name matches; All plus clearing search restores every card.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Payment Gateway filtering and Card search worked, but clearing both and restoring every card was not completed. Evidence: brief-shared.png

criteria.name: watch_log_records_executive
criteria.description: Opening the Payment Gateway executive video modal appends Nikhil Rao to the Watch log; closing the modal leaves that entry present and visible in the Sprint launch brief panel.
criteria.reasoning: Opening Nikhil Rao’s video led to Nikhil Rao appearing in the live Sprint brief JSON/watch state. Evidence: brief-shared.png

criteria.name: command_palette_jump_and_brief
criteria.description: Pressing Ctrl+K opens the command palette with search focused; choosing Jump to Payment Gateway closes the palette and scrolls that section into view with its nav cell active; choosing Open sprint brief opens the Sprint launch brief panel.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Command palette opened and Jump to Payment Gateway worked, but Open sprint brief was not chosen from the palette. Evidence: brief-shared.png

criteria.name: undo_redo_shortlist
criteria.description: Pinning Voice Payments then Undo returns the Shortlist tray count to 0 and clears the pin mark while the brief preview shortlistedFeatures becomes []; Redo restores the pin, count 1, and preview together.
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Undo/Redo shortlist behavior was not exercised end-to-end. Evidence: brief-shared.png

criteria.name: sprint_brief_api_shaped_field_contract
criteria.description: Export sprint brief opens JSON and Markdown tabs; JSON is an API-shaped payload with exactly the required keys: required string brand (Novapay), required string event (Sprint 26), required arrays shortlistedFeatures/compareFeatures/watchedExecutives, required closed-enum themeFilter, required string searchQuery (≤120 chars), and required string generatedAt (ISO-8601 UTC ending in Z); after pinning Voice Payments and Quick Buy 2.0, adding Biometric Card Authentication to compare, setting Theme filter Payment Gateway, typing Card, and watching Nikhil Rao's video, those live values appear in the JSON with a fresh generatedAt.
criteria.reasoning: JSON showed exactly the required schema fields, valid enum/string/array values, live shortlist/compare/filter/search/watch values, and ISO UTC generatedAt. Evidence: brief-shared.png

criteria.name: sprint_brief_download_copy_import
criteria.description: Download on the JSON tab offers novapay-sprint-26-brief.json containing the live schema-valid session values; Copy shows Copied; Import of a previously exported contract-valid brief restores shortlist, compare, theme filter, search, watchedExecutives/Watch log, and pinned marks to match.
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Copy feedback was observed, but download contents and restore via importing the exported contract were not completed. Evidence: brief-shared.png

criteria.name: brief_import_rejects_contract_violations
criteria.description: Importing a contract-invalid brief (brand not Novapay, themeFilter outside All/Agentic Stack/International Payments/Payment Gateway/D2C/Marketing/Business Banking, compareFeatures with four names, a shortlistedFeatures name not on the page catalog, or generatedAt not an ISO-8601 UTC string ending in Z) leaves shortlist, compare, theme filter, search, and watch log unchanged and shows an inline import error naming the offending field or rule.
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Contract-invalid import cases were not exercised. Evidence: brief-shared.png

criteria.name: load_sample_brief_restores_state
criteria.description: Activating Load sample brief in the Sprint launch brief panel loads the built-in contract-valid sample through the same restore path as Import: Shortlist tray, Compare tray, Watch log, pinned marks, and both preview tabs reflect the sample's contents
criteria.reasoning: Load sample brief produced a successful import and populated shortlist, compare, watched executive, theme filter, and JSON preview. Evidence: brief-shared.png

criteria.reasoning: FAIL: At 1440px the six-label desktop nav is visible, but at 768px the row is clipped after the third label instead of fully fitting. Evidence: desktop-shared.png, tablet-768-shared.png

criteria.name: mobile_tap_targets_adequate
criteria.description: Below 768px, primary interactive controls (hamburger, menu items, GET ACCESS rail, play controls) present tap targets at least about 44px in height or width.
criteria.reasoning: Hamburger is 44×44px, mobile menu items are 58px tall, GET ACCESS is 44px tall, and play controls are 56×56px. Evidence: mobile-375-shared.png, mobile-menu-375-shared.png

criteria.name: type_steps_at_768_and_mobile
criteria.description: Typography steps at the 768px and mobile breakpoints (nav, hero billboard, section titles) rather than jumping between unrelated font families mid-resize.

criteria.name: no_clip_at_375
